content: cosmos.gl (formerly @cosmograph/cosmos, now @cosmos.gl/graph, OpenJS Foundation) is a GPU force-directed layout+render engine. v2 API replaced setData with setPointPositions(Float32Array of x,y pairs) and setLinks(Float32Array of source,target index pairs). Styling via setPointColors(Float32Array rgba), setPointSizes, setLinkColors, setLinkWidths — separate typed-array buffers used directly as WebGL textures, so attributes can be updated independently of positions/links. Links reference points by integer index (dense node ids), confirming the pubkey->index remap requirement.
